query: How can I reset my password?
answer: To reset your password, click on 'Forgot Password' on the login page and follow the instructions.

query: What is your return policy?
answer: Our return policy allows returns within 30 days of purchase with a receipt.

query: How do I update my account information?
answer: You can update your account information under 'Account Settings'.

query: Where can I find my order history?
answer: You can find your order history under the 'Orders' section of your account.

query: How do I contact customer support?
answer: You can contact customer support through the 'Contact Us' page or by email.

query: How do I change my payment method?
answer: To change your payment method, go to 'Payment Settings' in your account.

query: How can I track my order?
answer: You can track your order using the tracking number provided in your order confirmation email.

query: How do I cancel my order?
answer: Orders can be canceled within 24 hours by contacting customer support.

query: Can I change my shipping address?
answer: You can update your shipping address before the order is shipped.

query: Do you offer international shipping?
answer: Yes, we offer international shipping to most countries.

query: How do I reset my username?
answer: To reset your username, go to 'Account Settings' and click on 'Change Username'.

query: Can I make changes to my order after placing it?
answer: Changes can be made within 24 hours of placing the order by contacting customer support.

query: How do I apply a discount code?
answer: You can apply a discount code at checkout by entering it in the 'Discount Code' field.

query: What is the warranty on your products?
answer: We offer a one-year warranty on most products against manufacturing defects.

query: How do I delete my account?
answer: To delete your account, please contact customer support for assistance.

query: How do I subscribe to the newsletter?
answer: To subscribe, enter your email at the bottom of our homepage.

query: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept Visa, Mastercard, PayPal, and Apple Pay.

query: How do I change my email address?
answer: Go to 'Account Settings' and select 'Change Email'.

query: Is my personal information secure?
answer: Yes, we use encryption to protect all your personal data.

query: Can I reorder a previous purchase?
answer: Yes, go to 'Order History' and click 'Reorder'.

query: Do you have a mobile app?
answer: Yes, our mobile app is available on iOS and Android.

query: How do I unsubscribe from emails?
answer: Click the 'Unsubscribe' link at the bottom of any email.

query: Can I send a gift directly to someone?
answer: Yes, choose 'Gift' option during checkout and enter recipient's details.

query: What should I do if I receive a damaged item?
answer: Contact support immediately with a photo of the item.

query: Do you offer gift cards?
answer: Yes, you can purchase digital gift cards from our website.

query: What are your shipping costs?
answer: Shipping costs depend on your location and the delivery speed you choose; the exact fee is shown at checkout before you pay.

query: How long does delivery take?
answer: Standard delivery usually takes 3-5 business days; expedited options are available at checkout for faster delivery.

query: Can I get same-day delivery?
answer: Same-day delivery is available in select cities for orders placed before 12 PM local time.

query: Do you ship to PO boxes?
answer: Yes, standard shipping supports PO boxes, but expedited and courier services may not.

query: Can I ship to multiple addresses in one order?
answer: Currently each order can only be shipped to a single address; please place separate orders for multiple destinations.

query: What happens if my package is lost?
answer: If tracking shows no movement for over 10 business days, contact support and we'll open an investigation with the carrier or send a replacement.

query: Can I change my delivery date?
answer: Once an order has shipped we can't change the delivery date, but you can contact the carrier directly using your tracking number.

query: Do you offer weekend delivery?
answer: Weekend delivery is available in some regions as a paid option at checkout.

query: What does "processing" mean on my order status?
answer: "Processing" means we've received your order and are preparing it for shipment; it hasn't left our warehouse yet.

query: How do I know when my order has shipped?
answer: You'll receive an email with a tracking number as soon as your order leaves our warehouse.

query: Can I pick up my order in-store instead of shipping?
answer: Yes, select "Store Pickup" at checkout if a participating location is near you.

query: What are your customer service hours?
answer: Our support team is available Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM, and Saturday mornings.

query: Do you offer live chat support?
answer: Yes, live chat is available on our website during business hours.

query: Can I contact you on social media?
answer: Yes, you can message us on our official social media accounts for quick questions.

query: How do I check my gift card balance?
answer: Enter your gift card number on the "Gift Cards" page to see your remaining balance.

query: Do gift cards expire?
answer: No, our gift cards do not have an expiration date.

query: Can I combine a gift card with a discount code?
answer: Yes, gift cards can be combined with one discount code per order.

query: What is your price match policy?
answer: We match the price of an identical in-stock item found at a major competitor within 7 days of purchase.

query: Do you offer student discounts?
answer: Yes, verified students get 10% off with a valid student ID through our discount partner.

query: Do you offer discounts for healthcare workers?
answer: Yes, healthcare workers can verify their status through our partner to receive a special discount.

query: How do loyalty points work?
answer: You earn points on every purchase, which can be redeemed for discounts on future orders once you reach the minimum threshold.

query: Do loyalty points expire?
answer: Loyalty points expire after 12 months of account inactivity.

query: How do I redeem loyalty points?
answer: Loyalty points are automatically available to apply at checkout once you've reached the minimum redemption amount.

query: What is your referral program?
answer: Refer a friend and you'll both receive a discount code once their first order ships.

query: Can I get a discount if the price drops after I buy?
answer: If the price drops within 7 days of your purchase, contact support for a one-time price adjustment.

query: Do you offer installment or pay-later options?
answer: Yes, you can split your payment into installments through our checkout payment partner.

query: Is it safe to save my card details on your site?
answer: Yes, all payment information is encrypted and stored securely by our PCI-compliant payment provider.

query: What should I do if my payment is declined?
answer: Double-check your card details and billing address, or try an alternative payment method; contact your bank if the issue persists.

query: Can I get an invoice for my order?
answer: Yes, you can download an invoice from your order details page in "Order History."

query: Can I get a VAT/tax receipt?
answer: Yes, VAT receipts are included with your invoice and can be downloaded from your account.

query: Do you offer business or corporate accounts?
answer: Yes, we offer corporate accounts with centralized billing; contact sales to set one up.

query: Is there a minimum order for free shipping?
answer: Orders over a set amount qualify for free standard shipping, shown at checkout.

query: Do you charge customs or import duties?
answer: International orders may be subject to customs fees and import duties, which are the customer's responsibility.

query: Do prices include tax?
answer: Displayed prices exclude tax; applicable tax is calculated and added at checkout based on your location.

query: Can I return an item without the original packaging?
answer: Yes, but items in their original packaging are processed faster and reduce the risk of damage in transit.

query: Can I return an item without a receipt?
answer: Yes, we can look up your purchase using your email address or order number instead of a receipt.

query: Who pays for return shipping?
answer: Return shipping is free for defective items; for other returns a small fee may be deducted from your refund.

query: How long does a refund take to process?
answer: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after we receive your returned item.

query: Can I exchange an item for a different size instead of a refund?
answer: Yes, select "Exchange" instead of "Return" during the return process to request a different size.

query: Is there a restocking fee for returns?
answer: Most items have no restocking fee; large or custom items may have a fee, shown on the product page.

query: Do you extend your return window during the holidays?
answer: Yes, items purchased in November and December can typically be returned through the end of January.

query: Are clearance or final sale items returnable?
answer: Final sale and clearance items marked as such cannot be returned or exchanged.

query: What is your warranty claim process?
answer: Contact support with your order number and a description of the issue; we'll guide you through the warranty claim.

query: Can I purchase extended warranty coverage?
answer: Yes, extended warranty plans are offered at checkout for eligible products.

query: How do I register my product for warranty?
answer: Most products are covered automatically using your order as proof of purchase; some brands also offer optional online registration for extended support.

query: What should I do if a product is recalled?
answer: We'll email all affected customers with recall instructions; you can also check our recalls page for updates.

query: Do your products have safety certifications?
answer: Yes, our products meet applicable safety standards, listed in the product specifications.

query: Is there an age restriction on certain products?
answer: Some products require the buyer to confirm they are 18 or older at checkout.

query: Can I see the size guide before ordering?
answer: Yes, a size guide is available on every product page under "Size & Fit."

query: What if the color I want is out of stock?
answer: You can sign up for a restock notification on the product page to be emailed when it's back.

query: Can I be notified when an out-of-stock item is available again?
answer: Yes, click "Notify Me" on the product page and we'll email you when it's restocked.

query: Do you offer pre-orders?
answer: Yes, upcoming products available for pre-order are marked on the product page with an estimated ship date.

query: Can I personalize or engrave a product?
answer: Select products offer personalization options on the product page before adding to cart.

query: Do you provide assembly instructions?
answer: Yes, an instruction manual is included in the box and also available for download on the product page.

query: Can I order replacement parts?
answer: Yes, replacement parts for eligible products are available in our "Parts & Accessories" section.

query: Is battery or charger compatibility guaranteed across products?
answer: Compatible accessories are listed on each product page; using non-listed accessories may void the warranty.

query: Do you sell gift wrapping?
answer: Yes, gift wrapping can be added as an option during checkout.

query: Can I include a gift receipt without prices?
answer: Yes, select "This is a gift" at checkout to include a price-free gift receipt.

query: Can I send an order directly to someone else as a gift?
answer: Yes, enter the recipient's address as the shipping address and add a gift message at checkout.

query: Can I use one account for both the website and the app?
answer: Yes, your account and order history are automatically shared between the website and the app.

query: How do I manage notification settings in the app?
answer: Go to Settings > Notifications in the app to customize what alerts you receive.

query: How do I turn on two-factor authentication?
answer: Enable two-factor authentication under Account Settings > Security for extra login protection.

query: What if I forgot my username but remember my email?
answer: Use the "Forgot Username" link on the login page and we'll email it to your registered address.

query: Can I merge two accounts?
answer: We can't merge accounts automatically, but support can help transfer order history to one account manually.

query: What's the difference between deactivating and deleting my account?
answer: Deactivating hides your profile temporarily; deleting permanently erases your account and data after a 30-day grace period.

query: Can I change my preferred language on the site?
answer: Yes, select your language from the menu in the site header at any time.

query: Can I change my preferred currency?
answer: Yes, select your currency from the menu in the site header; prices update automatically.

query: How do I opt out of SMS notifications?
answer: Reply STOP to any SMS message, or update your preferences in Account Settings > Notifications.

query: I unsubscribed from emails, how do I opt back in?
answer: Resubscribe anytime from the "Email Preferences" link at the bottom of any of our past emails or in Account Settings.

query: Why isn't my promo code working?
answer: Check the code's expiration date and any minimum purchase or product exclusions; some codes can't be combined with other offers.

query: Do you offer employee or wholesale pricing?
answer: Wholesale and bulk pricing is available for qualifying orders; contact our sales team for details.

query: Can I dispute a charge I don't recognize?
answer: Contact our support team first so we can investigate before you file a chargeback with your bank.

query: What are the dimensions and weight of a product?
answer: Full dimensions and weight are listed in the "Specifications" tab on each product page.

query: Do you sell products internationally in local currency?
answer: Yes, prices are shown in your local currency automatically based on your shipping country.

query: Is your website accessible for users with disabilities?
answer: Yes, our site follows WCAG accessibility guidelines; contact support if you encounter any barriers.
